name: CCaaS Needs Assessment
description: Pre-solution needs assessment for contact center and omnichannel solutions used to define business, operational, technical, integration, workforce, quality, security, and migration requirements prior to design and quoting.

fields.label: Customer Name
Assessment Date
Platform(s) Under Consideration

sections.title: Routing, IVR, Queue & Flow Design Requirements

statementTemplates.statementTemplate: The solution must support the following channels in phase 1: {{channels_required_phase_1}}.
The solution must support the following routing capabilities: {{routing_capabilities_required}}.
IVR and/or self-service capabilities are required in phase 1.
CRM integration is required in phase 1, including the required CRM use cases defined by the customer.
The solution must support the following reporting capabilities: {{reporting_levels_required}}.
WFM capabilities are required in phase 1, including: {{wfm_capabilities_required}}.
QM capabilities are required in phase 1, including: {{qm_capabilities_required}}.
Customer security and/or procurement review is a required dependency before purchase and implementation.
Before solution design proceeds, the customer must provide the following prerequisite inputs: {{customer_prerequisites_before_design}}.

recommendations.recommendedAction: Proceed to solution design and quote once the Statement of Requirements is approved.
Proceed only after dependencies, scope gaps, or unresolved requirements are addressed.
Do not proceed to design / quote until discovery gaps and prerequisites are resolved.

answers.phase_1_scope_summary: North America support organization with voice and chat.
answers.future_phase_scope_summary: Email, SMS, WFM, and QM in later phases.
answers.current_problems_to_solve: Long queue times, fragmented reporting, and no unified agent experience.
answers.success_90_days: Voice and chat are live with better queue visibility and supervisor controls.
answers.success_6_12_months: SLA and CSAT improve while staffing decisions become more data-driven.
answers.sites_or_business_units_in_scope: US and Canada customer support teams.
answers.channel_specific_slas: Voice calls answered in 80/20, chat initial response within 30 seconds.
answers.current_routing_model: Skill-based voice queues and basic web chat assignment.
answers.current_state_pain_points: Too many tools, poor visibility, limited overflow logic, and manual reporting.
answers.queue_and_skill_requirements: Tier 1, Tier 2, billing, technical support, and Spanish language queues.
answers.ivr_requirements: Business hours menu, language selection, billing and support menu branches, callback option.
answers.transfer_and_escalation_requirements: Warm transfer to Tier 2 and supervisor escalation path.
answers.agent_desktop_requirements: Single pane of glass with customer context and embedded CRM.
answers.migration_scope: Inbound voice queues and web chat phase 1, email later.
answers.telephony_or_number_porting_dependencies: Existing carrier numbers must port during cutover.

requirements.statement: The solution must support the following channels in phase 1: voice and chat.
The solution must support the following routing capabilities: skill-based routing, language-based routing, overflow routing, business-hours routing, callback, and omnichannel routing.
CRM integration is required in phase 1, including the required CRM use cases defined by the customer.

sections.businessOutcomes: Customer seeks to reduce wait times, improve SLA, improve CSAT, and improve reporting visibility.
sections.scopeChannels: Phase 1 includes North America support teams with voice and chat; email and SMS are planned later.
sections.routingFlow: The solution must support skill-based, language-based, overflow, business-hours, and callback routing with IVR in phase 1.
sections.agentSupervisorExperience: Agents require a unified desktop with CRM context; supervisors require live dashboards and monitoring controls.
sections.integrations: Salesforce integration is required in phase 1 for screen pop, case handling, and activity logging.
sections.customerResponsibilities: Customer must provide current flows, queue definitions, reporting requirements, integration contacts, and security requirements before design.

generated.recommendedAction: Proceed only after dependencies, scope gaps, or unresolved requirements are addressed.
